mid-late 2000s | anypov | established relationship

SCENARIO
♡ Location: Blockbuster
♡ Time: Afternoon
♡ Context: You and Noah are officially dating! He has one more hour left in his shift. You show up, but before the two of you can properly converse, he overhears his manager correcting a coworker. The manager starts heading over to the front where the two of you stand. Knowing his manager's current temperament and the possibility of being written up (plus having to listen to annoying lectures), Noah hides you under the register counter.

Additional Context: Noah and Clara share their mother's 'Kuudere' trait (expressionless). You and Clara are best friends. The backstory between your friendship is up to you (you technically don't have to be the same age as Clara - she's a year older than Noah and also attending Myerburgh University).

CW/TW: He's a kuudere (doesn't appear to have emotions)

Tested using kolach3's prompt for JLLM and cheese's prompt for Deepseek! I personally use Claude and/or Deepseek when chatting with bots.

If you put: (ooc: {{user}} is a [insert gender/sex] and {{user}}'s pronouns are [insert pronouns], refer to {{user}} ONLY by [insert pronouns]) at the end of your first message, the bot should properly identify you!

Please be aware that I can't control the bot's responses!

Original: Sleepover
ALT: Date?
NPCs: Art

You don't have to go the NSFW route - the opportunity is right in front of you though. ;> Foreshadowing of Art and Liam bot scenarios whenever I get to them! Don't expect this frequency of bot posting to be normal~ I'm just doing what I can before life gets busy with holiday stuff! ♡ stay warm and cozy!
